3079680.name: The Maker
3079680.description:
『The Maker』

Deep in the forest, in a secluded cabin, lived a puppeteer. With a letter of request in hand, delivered to the postbox, the puppeteer creates dolls tonight. The never-ending rain, an old record playing classical music, the radio announcing missing persons... What is the puppeteer's secret?

System
A 3D, immersive FPS game. Progress through the game with clicks and key inputs. It is a short game with a playtime of around 15 minutes. Create the dolls and complete your tasks.

Controls
Move: A＋D
Camera rotation: Mouse
